title: GHA Windows workflow
body:
This is a minimal working version that is already useful. It is not meant to be final, but hopefully good enough to start a discussion.

Related issue: #715.

comments.body: @gaborcsardi https://github.com/containers/skopeo/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#sign-your-prs please, we can’t really even look at a contribution with unclear copyright status.

> (b) The contribution is based upon previous work that, to the best
    of my knowledge, is covered under an appropriate open source
    license and I have the right under that license to submit that
    work with modifications, whether created in whole or in part
    by me, under the same open source license (unless I am
    permitted to submit under a different license), as indicated
    in the file; or

The PR is based on code from comments in the referenced issue, so unfortunately I cannot sign this, IDK what the license of that code is.

Thanks. One path forward might be to ask the author of that comment for a sign-off.

OTOH, to be transparent, I couldn’t really review the PR as is — I’d be looking for help for Podman colleagues — so I don’t want to promise that it be merged but for the sign-off.
